subcodes.first_line: O Jalal! Upon thee be the Glory of God, the All-Sufficient, the Most Exalted! Thy letters from before and after have reached Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جلال علیک بهاء الله الغنی المتعال نامهای شما از قبل و بعد رسید هر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
